assessment_items.question_content:
**Which place value model shows $2{,}923$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: $2{,}923= 2\text{ thousands}+9\text{ hundreds}+2\text{ tens}+3\text{ ones}$

So, we need to show $2$ thousands, $9$ hundreds, $2$ tens, and $3$ ones with the place value blocks.

[[☃ image 1]]

This place value model shows $2{,}923$:

[[☃ image 1]]
